text:
Once upon a time, in a magical forest, there lived a shy squirrel named Sylvester. Sylvester loved nuts more than anything else, but one autumn he heard whispers of a nutless wonderland.

Curious, he ventured forth through the vines and undergrowth until he reached a clearing bathed in moonlight. There lived an old gnome known only as Whisperwind. Whisperwind listened to Sylvester's longing and offered him a magical spell. With a chuckle he waved his StaffOfEveryKind. Sylvester swallowed hard.

"Now remember," Whisperwind hissed softly, "nobody knows your secret."

With determination Sylvester nodded and snapped his fingers. Nuts disappeared! He laughed triumphantly. But soon whispers turned into screams as everything nutritious vanished. Silence. Then, seeds...

Gathered them. Planted them. Soon flowers bloomed. He nurtured the woods. Nut-bearing trees bloomed. Sylvester felt proud. Trees filled with apples. He hoarded them.
